creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2007-07-10 21:40:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/paros            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  "A Java based HTTP/HTTPS proxy for assessing web application
  vulnerability. It supports editing/viewing HTTP messages on-the-fly.
  Other featuers include spiders, client certificate, proxy-chaining,
  intelligent scanning for XSS and SQL injections etc."
  
  WWW: http://www.parosproxy.org/
  
  PR:             ports/114047
  Submitted by:   Wesley Shields <wxs@atarininja.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1862    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +41 -0     ports/www/paros/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/paros/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/paros/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +56 -0     ports/www/paros/pkg-plist (new)
